ground_truth.title: Top 11 Gaming Console Companies & Manufacturers | 2025
ground_truth.main_content: The global gaming console market size reached a value of about USD 56.25 Billion in 2024. The market is further expected to grow at a CAGR of about 7.2% in the forecast period of 2025-2034 to reach a value of around USD 112.74 Billion by 2034. As per the analysis by Expert Market Research, the market is expected to be driven by the rapid technological advancements and innovations like advanced audio-visual systems. The main purpose of a gaming console is to enable users to play video games. Popular gaming consoles include the various models of Wii, PlayStation, Xbox, and Leap TV, among others. Multi-purpose gaming console systems have been increasingly popular in recent years, which has helped the gaming console market thrive. With an increase in players, the gaming console market is seeing a revival. This is due to the rapid technological developments and advances, such as advanced audio-visual systems, which are driving up demand for gaming consoles worldwide. The market has also been helped by other factors like rising disposable incomes, the availability of different options to suit the preferences of consumers, and the numerous advantages provided by gaming consoles, which allow users to download videos and audios, browse the internet, listen to music, and watch videos while playing games. However, it is projected that the high price of gaming consoles and the growing consumer inclination toward alternative platforms like internet games and mobile games will restrain the market expansion. Consumers' increasing investment in high-end displays and TVs in order to enjoy thrilling gaming experiences is predicted to fuel gaming console market expansion over the course of the forecast period. The Asia Pacific is estimated to account for a significant share in the market due to the home console and specialised console markets' expanding penetration. Further, the region is anticipated to grow strongly over the course of the forecast period due to the widespread availability of 3D gaming gear and software, which will give it an advantage over other regional markets. In the upcoming years, emerging economies like China and India are expected to experience rapid growth and become some of the prime gaming demand generators in the coming years, thus aiding the gaming console market. According to Expert Market Research, the top 11 gaming console companies are Sony Corporation, Microsoft Corporation, Nintendo Co., Ltd, Logitech International SA, Atari Inc., Meta Platforms Technologies, LLC, Samsung Electronics Co. Ltd., Valve Corporation, HTC Corporation, ASUSTEK Computer Inc., and Anbernic.
with: The global gaming console market size reached a value of about USD 56.25 Billion in 2024.
The market is further expected to grow at a CAGR of about 7.2% in the forecast period of 2025-2034 to reach a value of around USD 112.74 Billion by 2034.

According to Expert Market Research, the top 11 gaming console companies are Sony Corporation, Microsoft Corporation, Nintendo Co., Ltd, Logitech International SA, Atari Inc., Meta Platforms Technologies, LLC, Samsung Electronics Co. Ltd., Valve Corporation, HTC Corporation, ASUSTEK Computer Inc., and Anbernic.

Sony is a global leader in electronics, gaming, and entertainment, perhaps best known for its PlayStation console, which has revolutionized the gaming industry with cutting-edge hardware and innovative titles.
The Asia Pacific is estimated to account for a significant share in the market due to the home console and specialised console markets' expanding penetration.
